root: ^The day is finally here! I have my own company!
^I assume you mean our company, sis
^Well yes, but no need to fret over small details
^Anyway, I... spreaded the news about our new toys so you should have plenty of deliveries to do
^Pass by the post office and do as many as you can for the day
^It's okay if you can't do all of them, but the more you deliver, the highest our rankings will be
^I'll continue to market them on the meantime, good luck
